title: Golden Quinoa Bowl
instructions: Wash, trim, and prepare all vegetables before heating the pan.
Warm oil in a heavy pan and add aromatics until fragrant.
Add the main vegetables, grain, or protein and cook until lightly golden.
Season with salt, pepper, herbs, and a bright squeeze of lemon.
Simmer or toss until the texture is tender and glossy.
Plate neatly, garnish with herbs, and serve warm.
